programme.desc: Frank forces Marco to choose either Marie or him as a friend. Ray sides with Frank because he doesn't approve of his mother having a male friend.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray loses his wedding ring and is propositioned by a woman at the airport. When Debra finds out what happened, she pretends to be single too..

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: On the day when he's hosting a wine-tasting party, Frasier hires a contractor to remove a scratch from his floor, but he takes apart the whole apartment.

programme.title: Vanessa
programme.desc: Raw, unfiltered, authentic and personal, Vanessa Feltz wants you to tell her what's on your mind. Fiery discussions, a good giggle and plenty of afternoon gossip.

programme.title: Castle
programme.desc: Castle and Beckett investigate what appears to be the assassination of an intelligence operative. Meanwhile, Beckett's romance with Demming threatens her relationship with Castle.

programme.title: Castle
programme.desc: US mystery series about a top crime writer who turns sleuth. Castle must prove his innocence when police find him standing over a dead woman, holding a gun.

programme.title: Love Nature
programme.desc: Following Alan Winlow, a lover of nature in his eighties, with a passion for tree planting. He has planted over 4000 trees but has a particular love for the willow tree.

programme.title: 5 News with Dan Walker
programme.desc: Join Dan Walker and the team for the news that matters to you.

programme.title: Love Nature
programme.desc: Fifteen years ago Katy South started up the Prickles & Paws Hedgehog rescue centre with her mum and the 'hogspital' now rehabilitates around 1400 hedgehogs every year.

programme.title: Susan Calman's Grand Day Out
programme.desc: the inspiration for romantic novelist Jilly Cooper. Susan visits Bisley, which was home to the author, Tewkesbury Abbey and Sudeley Castle.

programme.title: Coastguard: Search & Rescue SOS
programme.desc: A distress call comes in from the uninhabited granite islet Rockall, a lone dog on a cliff in Wales causes concern, and there are people stranded in a Cornish blow hole.

programme.title: The Yorkshire Vet: Night Shift
programme.desc: The team tackles serious cases on the night shift, including a spaniel injured after a freak accident on a woodland walk and an angry cat brought in after a late-night scrap.

programme.title: The Hardacres
programme.desc: Return of the warm-hearted rags-to-riches family saga. It's 1895 - modernity in the form of electricity appears at Hardacre Hall as well as formidable new arrival Lady Imelda Hansen.

programme.title: The Mushroom Murders: The Case That Gripped the World
programme.desc: We reveal the full story of how, in July 2023, Erin Patterson murdered three dinner guests and attempted to murder another by serving them a poisonous beef wellington.

programme.title: My Boyfriend Made Me Do It
programme.desc: How Australian mother Yoshe was sentenced to 23 years in a Cambodian prison for smuggling heroin. And Kelly's gangster partner coerced her into staking out a million-pound tiara.

programme.title: Murder 360
programme.desc: When the remains of seven people are found behind a strip mall, detectives suspect they are looking for one of Connecticut's most prolific serial killers.

programme.title: Cruise TV with LoveitBookit
programme.desc: Your one-stop-shop for all things cruise; bringing you the hottest destinations, ground-breaking ships and the latest deals to ensure your next cruise holiday is your greatest one.

programme.title: A Yorkshire Farm
programme.desc: Rob and Dave Nicholson must cope with troublesome births during the small hours of a frenetic lambing season. And an infectious disease threatens the lives of newborn kid goats.

programme.title: A Yorkshire Farm
programme.desc: How to check for pregnancy in Alpacas, why happy cows produce more milk, and alternative methods to grow weird and wonderful vegetables from around the world.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Joey finally dates Janine, but she does not like his friends. Rachel worries that Phoebe will not appreciate the way she furnishes their apartment.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Ross and Chandler bicker over which of them created a joke. Joey begins working at Central Perk, and a remark of Phoebe's leads to trouble between the girls.

programme.title: **Visually Signed**The Highland Vet
programme.desc: Observational documentary series following vets in Thurso and Wick. David receives an emergency call from a shepherdess when a mother struggles to feed her lambs. (VS).

programme.title: **Visually Signed** PAW Patrol
programme.desc: Ryder and the Pups visit Tracker and Carlos in the jungle, where a group of monkeys find themselves in sticky bubble trouble! (VS).

programme.desc: Nanny Plum and the Wise Old Elf must come up with a plan to stop two very hungry gnomes from eating everything in sight. (VS).
